records.name: Aequor
records.descriptionTemplate: They come from the depths of the sea.

records.name: Awakener
records.descriptionTemplate: Powerful individuals Awakened by the Silver. Be cautious if you encounter them.

records.name: Beast
records.descriptionTemplate: Maddened beings that destroy all mercilessly.

records.name: Caro
records.descriptionTemplate: They are composed of aberrant flesh.

records.name: Committee
records.descriptionTemplate: Avoid these monochrome hunters, for their purge is ruthless.

records.name: Departed
records.descriptionTemplate: A creature formed after the body dies, with the soul residing elsewhere. Beings that devour both flesh and soul share similar traits.

records.name: Dominion
records.descriptionTemplate: Immensely powerful foes that spawn anomalies.

records.name: Empty Shell
records.descriptionTemplate: Though weak on their own, they are frightening when they gather together.

records.name: Humanoid
records.descriptionTemplate: Still retaining an obvious human shape, it could have been a familiar face from the street corner.

records.name: Insectoid
records.descriptionTemplate: They are insectoid beings, embodying a single, shared hive mind.

records.name: Kynde
records.descriptionTemplate: The elites among the enemies, a single one is a formidable challenge.

records.name: Lightbearers
records.descriptionTemplate: A group of mad devotees who see the black dissolution as the light of salvation.

records.name: Mutant
records.descriptionTemplate: Mysterious creatures born from the Dissolution, their very structures are a complete unknown.

records.name: Plant
records.descriptionTemplate: They are no longer content to simply nourish the world.

records.name: Primordial Shadow
records.descriptionTemplate: Upon encountering them, move away quickly. This is the only advice you'll get.

records.name: Sculptors
records.descriptionTemplate: A group of cruel scientists and radical fusion experimenters.

records.name: Snowfield
records.descriptionTemplate: They originate from the icy wilderness.

records.name: Ultra
records.descriptionTemplate: They bear the marks of dimension traversal.

records.name: Unknown
records.descriptionTemplate: Unseen by humanity, these mysterious creatures defy any scientific classification.
